profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Tira Austenite Tbk engages in the trading and distribution of technical products in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Trading and Distribution of Technical Products; Welding and Molding Industry; and Distribution of Industrial Gases. The company offers tools, stainless, machinery, and wear resistance steel. It also provides gas packaging and transportation services; gases such as breathing air, helium, anaerobic atmosphere, blood gas, and lung diffusion gas mixtures, as well as special gases comprising analytical instrumentation mixtures, electron capture, FID fuel, leak detection, nuclear counter, chemical process, carbon monoxide, ethylene, methane, propane, sulfur hexafluoride, emission calibration, environmental compliance mixtures, gas mixtures, high purity gas products, hydrocarbon calibration standards, and laser gas mixture; gas installation services; purging for tanks and pipes; hydrostatic tests for steel tubes, and other equipment. In addition, the company manufactures bronze and maintenance electrode; and provides metal casting and bronze casting services. PT Tira Austenite Tbk was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia.
